---
title: Dhafer Malouche
---


<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">



<img src="IMG-1525.png" style="float: right; width:20%; border:1px solid; margin-right: 20px" align="left">


  
# {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

## About me

I’m Dhafer Malouche, an Associate Research Scholar at the Department of Statistics and Data Science at Yale University. I also am affiliated with the Whitney and Betty MacMillan Center for International and Area Studies. Currently, I have been working on the G-Econ research project in the Department of Economics. Lead by Professor William Nordhaus, this project is devoted to developing a geophysically-based data set on economic activity for the world.  I'm also Professor of Statistics on leave from the University of Carthage in Tunisia. 


For my everyday work, I use R, Python, H2O, and Spark. In this website I will be sharing many R and Python codes where I show how one can use these softwares to solve Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, and Data Visualization problems. I would greatly appreciate all feedback, comments, and questions. 

So feel free to [contact me](mailto:dhafer.malouche@yale.edu)
